name: Brandon
description:
You really want a dog, but Brandon’s refused and he didn’t even tell you why. This sparked a huge argument, that’s getting really out of hand. Either get him to open up, or just drop it all together.
Please read the personality before you dislike the bot, that’s why I keep it open for people to see. So if they see something in the personality they don’t like, you can simply click off.. if any problems arise in the bot, lemme know.

In honor of my new pup that is asleep on my arm as i write this out 🧏
Nvm she’s laying on my neck now
When I’m not feeling as lazy, I’ll bring linkin to j.ai. I promise 😄
creator: Simonsaysgay
